atoms.subject: governance
atoms.object_text: Git history rewrites (filter-branch, filter-repo, BFG) are the ONLY authorized method for removing accidentally committed large objects. Force-pushing rewritten history requires STATE B approval.

atoms.subject: governance
atoms.object_text: Autolint daemons may perform deterministic formatting and lint autofixes only. Non-lint architectural changes require a separate branch, impact check, and human review.

atoms.subject: governance
atoms.object_text: Any non-source payload moved out of Git must be represented by an artifact manifest containing URI, sha256, owner, retention class, source, status, and retrieval instructions.

atoms.subject: governance
atoms.object_text: Betterleaks is the canonical secret scanner. Gitleaks is the legacy fallback. Both must share the same .gitleaksignore suppression file. CI gates must never regress.

atoms.subject: governance
atoms.object_text: Repositories cloned into external_repos/ are read-only reference mirrors governed by external_repos/upstream_manifest.yaml. They must never be modified locally or committed to monorepo history.

atoms.subject: governance
atoms.object_text: Skill creation, update, archival, and deduplication must flow through the SkillOps subsystem. Ad-hoc skill file manipulation without registry update is prohibited.

atoms.subject: governance
atoms.object_text: Session boot probes must be strictly read-only. They must not mutate files, create branches, push commits, modify configuration, or trigger side effects.

atoms.subject: governance
atoms.object_text: All unsafe pattern findings from skills-audit.sh must be triaged into ACTUAL RISK, MODERATE, or FALSE POSITIVE categories before CI will pass. CI threshold is 15 unresolved unsafe findings.

atoms.subject: governance
atoms.object_text: Every mutating, architectural, schema-dependent, deployment, GitHub, database, browser-QA, authentication, or external-service action must pass through ToolGateway. The gateway hydrates AGENTS.md, operator_invariants.json, monorepo_manifest.yaml, truth_surfaces.yaml, relevant tool_contracts, Beads, Memory views, and existing package implementations before allowing execution.

atoms.subject: governance
atoms.object_text: Git is for canonical source, small docs, manifests, build files, tests, scripts, and policy. Large binaries, raw archives, external mirrors, generated indexes, vector DBs, notebook outputs, videos, model files, and build artifacts go to artifact storage or ignored local mirrors. Commit manifests, not payloads.

atoms.subject: governance
atoms.object_text: Automated pushes must use short-lived GitHub App installation tokens through scripts/auth_github_app.py or an approved wrapper. Token renewal handles expiration only; it is not a bypass for file-size limits, LFS budget, branch protection, or secret scanning.

atoms.subject: governance
atoms.object_text: Long-horizon work belongs in Beads. Durable knowledge belongs in Memory atoms. Research synthesis belongs in the knowledge vault. Evidence belongs in .agent/evidence.

atoms.subject: governance
atoms.object_text: LLM-compiled Markdown wikis are allowed for research synthesis, Q&A, reports, slides, and concept mapping. They must not override Git source, Bazel build truth, GitNexus/SCIP code truth, Beads task truth, Memory atom operational truth, or ToolGateway contracts.

atoms.subject: governance
atoms.object_text: Frontend changes must pass Gate 0: Biome, design-token lint, Taste profile review, and screenshot/video proof where applicable. Raw design values are forbidden outside token/spec files unless explicitly approved.

atoms.subject: governance
atoms.object_text: Bootstrap sequences that touch auth, workspace settings, indexes, repo clones, ZIP payloads, lint fixes, or validation must be decomposed into Beads issues and executed through ToolGateway contracts. They must not run as one broad bash payload.

atoms.subject: governance
atoms.object_text: Taste Skill concepts may guide design output, but repo-owned design.md, tokens.css, screenshots, accessibility checks, and lint gates remain the source of truth.
